words.definition: To achieve or complete something successfully.
words.exampleSentence: We can accomplish anything if we work together.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສຳເລັດ (het hai sam-led)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำสำเร็จ (tham sam-ret)

words.exampleSentence: The benevolent businessman donated millions to the orphanage.

words.definition: To work together with someone else in order to achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: The two companies agreed to cooperate on the new project.

words.definition: Careful and serious in your work or studies.
words.exampleSentence: Leo is a diligent student who always finishes his homework on time.

words.definition: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another.
words.exampleSentence: Having empathy allows you to connect deeper with people.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມເຫັນອົກເຫັນໃຈ (khuam hen ok hen chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความเห็นอกเห็นใจ (khwam hen ok hen chai)

words.definition: To change continually; shift back and forth uncertainly.
words.exampleSentence: The prices of vegetables fluctuate depending on the season.
This jacket is made of genuine leather.

words.definition: An idea or explanation that you test through study and experimentation.
words.exampleSentence: The scientist formed a hypothesis to explain the results of the experiment.
words.laoTranslation: ສົມມຸດຕິຖານ (som-mud-ti-than)

words.definition: Certain to happen and unable to be avoided.
words.exampleSentence: With so much traffic, delays are inevitable.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼີກລ່ຽງບໍ່ໄດ້ (lik liang bor dai)
words.thaiTranslation: หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้ (lik liang mai dai)

words.definition: To show or prove to be right or reasonable.
words.exampleSentence: You need to justify why you spent so much money.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ເຫດຜົນ (hai hed phon)
words.thaiTranslation: ให้เหตุผล (hai het phon)

words.definition: To cause or enable a condition or state to continue.
words.exampleSentence: It is important to maintain a healthy diet and lifestyle.

words.definition: New, original, and not like anything seen before.
words.exampleSentence: She suggested a novel approach to solving the problem.
words.laoTranslation: ໃໝ່ໆ/ແປກໃໝ່ (mai mai / paek mai)
words.thaiTranslation: แปลกใหม่ (plaek mai)

words.exampleSentence: It was obvious that she was unhappy with the results.
words.laoTranslation: ຈະແຈ້ງ / ຊັດເຈນ (cha chaeng / sad chen)

words.definition: To convince someone to do or believe something.
words.exampleSentence: He managed to persuade his parents to let him go on the trip.
words.laoTranslation: ຊັກຊວນ / ໂນ້ມນ້າວ (sak xuan / nom naw)
words.thaiTranslation: โน้มน้าว (nom nao)

words.definition: A person or a thing that seems to belong to the past and not to fit in the present.
words.exampleSentence: Using a typewriter in a modern office is considered an anachronism.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທີ່ຜິດຍຸກຜິດສະໄໝ (sing thi phid yuk phid sa-mai)
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งที่ผิดยุคผิดสมัย (sing thi phit yuk phit sa-mai)

words.definition: Changing mood or behavior suddenly and unexpectedly.
words.exampleSentence: The administration's capricious policies left businesses confused.
words.laoTranslation: ໂລເລ / ປ່ຽນແປງງ່າຍ (lo le / piang paeng ngai)
words.thaiTranslation: แปรปรวนง่าย / โลเล (prae pruan ngai / lo le)

words.definition: Lasting for a very short time.
words.exampleSentence: Fame in the world of internet memes is often ephemeral.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ຍືນຍົງ / ຊົ່ວຄາວ (bor yuen yong / chua khaw)
words.thaiTranslation: ชั่วครู่ / ไม่จีรัง (chua khru / mai chi-rang)

words.definition: Very careful and precise; showing great attention to detail.
words.exampleSentence: The researcher kept a meticulous record of all the data.
words.laoTranslation: ລະອຽດລະອໍ (la-iad la-or)
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน / ละเอียดลออ (phi-thi-phi-than / la-iat la-or)

words.definition: To deliberately make something unclear or difficult to understand.
words.exampleSentence: The politician tried to obfuscate the truth with long speeches.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສັບສົນ / ບັງຕາ (het hai sab-son / bang ta)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้สับสน / คลุมเครือ (tham hai sap-son / khlum-khruea)

words.definition: To examine something very carefully in order to discover information.
words.exampleSentence: Customers were encouraged to scrutinize the contract before signing.
words.laoTranslation: ກວດກາຢ່າງລະອຽດ (kuat ka yang la-iad)
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด (truat sop yang la-iat)

words.definition: To try serious or hard to do something.
words.exampleSentence: You must make an effort to arrive on time.

words.definition: To accept the duty to take care of something or accept the blame.
words.exampleSentence: As the manager, she decided to take responsibility for the error.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຜິດຊອບ (hab phid xob)
words.thaiTranslation: รับผิดชอบ (rap phit chop)

words.definition: Feeling a strong emotion, especially sadness or sympathy.
words.exampleSentence: Everyone was deeply moved by his touching speech.
words.laoTranslation: ປະທັບໃຈຢ່າງເລິກເຊິ່ງ (pa-thab chai yang lek seng)
words.thaiTranslation: ซาบซึ้งใจอย่างลึกซึ้ง (sap-sueng chai yang luek-sueng)

words.definition: To stop doing something that you do regularly.
words.exampleSentence: It is hard to break a habit of biting your nails.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊົາເຮັດຈົນເປັນນິໄສ (xao het chon pen ni-sai)
words.thaiTranslation: เลิกนิสัย (loek ni-sai)

words.exampleSentence: The beautiful dress in the window caught her eye.
words.laoTranslation: ດຶງດູດຄວາມສົນໃຈ (dueng dud khuam son chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ดึงดูดสายตา / เตะตา (dueng-dut sai-ta / te ta)

words.definition: To get more knowledge or skill from doing a job.
words.exampleSentence: An internship is a great way to gain experience.
words.laoTranslation: ເກັບກ່ຽວປະສົບການ (keb kiao pa-sob kan)
words.thaiTranslation: เก็บเกี่ยวประสบการณ์ (kep-kiao pra-sop-kan)

words.definition: To examine or view something briefly.
words.exampleSentence: Let me have a look at your report before you submit it.
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງ / ກວດເບິ່ງ (beung / kuat beung)
words.thaiTranslation: ดู / ตรวจดู (du / truat du)

words.definition: To not tell anyone else what someone has told you.
words.exampleSentence: Can you keep a secret? I am planning a surprise party.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາຄວາມລັບ (hak sa khuam lab)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาความลับ (rak-sa khwam lap)

words.definition: To do something faster or more efficiently.
words.exampleSentence: Taking the highway will save time.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດເວລາ (pa-yad we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดเวลา (pra-yat we-la)

words.definition: To watch, listen to, or think about something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the teacher during class.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໃຈ / ເອົາໃຈໃສ່ (tang chai / ao chai sai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจ / ใส่ใจ (tang-chai / sai-chai)

words.definition: To manage or control a company.
words.exampleSentence: My uncle runs a small grocery business in town.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍລິຫານທຸລະກິດ (bor-li-han thu-la-kit)
words.thaiTranslation: บริหารธุรกิจ (bo-ri-han thu-ra-kit)

words.definition: To alter your opinion or decision.
words.exampleSentence: If you change your mind, let me know before Friday.
words.thaiTranslation: เปลี่ยนใจ (plian chai)

words.definition: To create a dangerous situation or risk.
words.exampleSentence: Cyber attacks pose a major threat to national security.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄພຂົ່ມຂູ່ (pen phai khom khu)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นภัยคุกคาม (pen phai khuk-kham)

words.definition: To provide what is wanted or needed.
words.exampleSentence: The company increased production to meet the high demand.
words.laoTranslation: ຕອບສະໜອງຄວາມຕ້ອງການ (tob sa-nong khuam tong kan)
words.thaiTranslation: ตอบสนองความต้องการ (top-sa-nong khwam tong-kan)

words.definition: A state of being extremely poor and hopeless.
words.exampleSentence: Millions of people worldwide still live in abject poverty.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມທຸກຍາກລຳບາກແສນສາຫັດ (khuam thuk nyak lam bak saen sa hat)
words.thaiTranslation: ความยากจนข้นแค้น (khwam yak-chon khon-khaen)

words.definition: Very harsh, severe, and cruel criticism.
words.exampleSentence: The movie received scathing criticism from the reviewers.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິພາກວິຈານຢ່າງຮຸນແຮງ (kan wi-phak wi-chan yang hun-haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: การวิพากษ์วิจารณ์อย่างรุนแรง (kan wi-phak wi-chan yang run-raeng)

words.exampleSentence: The launch of the product was an unmitigated disaster.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຫາຍະນະຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ (khuam ha-ya-na yang sin seung)
words.thaiTranslation: ความหายนะอย่างสิ้นเชิง (khwam ha-ya-na yang sin-choeng)

words.definition: Facts or details that make a crime or mistake seem less serious or easier to forgive.
words.exampleSentence: The judge considered the suspect's youth as one of the mitigating factors.
words.laoTranslation: ປັດໄຈຜ່ອນຜັນ (pat-chai phon phan)
words.thaiTranslation: ปัจจัยผ่อนปรน / เหตุบรรเทาโทษ (pat-chai phon-pron)

words.definition: Connected so closely that they cannot be separated.
words.exampleSentence: Our health is inextricably linked to the quality of our environment.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູກພັນກັນຢ່າງແຍກບໍ່ອອກ (phuk phan kan yang yaek bor ok)
words.thaiTranslation: ผูกพันกันอย่างแยกไม่ออก (phuk-phan kan yang yaek mai ok)

words.definition: Strong and constant support or allegiance that never changes.
words.exampleSentence: The captain demanded unswerving loyalty from his crew members.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຈົງຮັກພັກດີຢ່າງໝັ້ນຄົງ (khuam chong hak phak di yang man khong)
words.thaiTranslation: ความจงรักภักดีอย่างมั่นคงไม่มีวันเปลี่ยนแปลง (khwam chong-rak phak-di)

words.definition: To take care of someone or something.
words.exampleSentence: Can you look after my cat while I am on vacation?
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງແຍງ (beung nyaeng)

words.definition: To cancel an event or an agreement.
words.exampleSentence: They had to call off the football match because of the heavy rain.

words.definition: To raise a child or to mention a topic in conversation.
words.exampleSentence: Please don't bring up politics during dinner.
words.laoTranslation: ລ້ຽງດູ / ຍົກຫົວຂໍ້ຂຶ້ນມາ (liang du / yok hua kho khuen ma)
words.thaiTranslation: เลี้ยงดู / หยิบยกประเด็น (liang-du / yip-yok pra-den)

words.definition: To finish the supply of something so that you have none left.
words.exampleSentence: We have run out of milk, so I need to go to the shop.

words.definition: To delay doing something until a later date.
words.exampleSentence: Never put off until tomorrow what you can do today.
words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນເວລາອອກໄປ (leuan we-la ok pai)
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนเวลาออกไป (luan we-la ok pai)

words.definition: To feel excited or happy about something that is going to happen.
words.exampleSentence: I am looking forward to hearing from you soon.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໜ້າຕັ້ງຕາຄອຍຖ້າ (tang na tang ta khoy tha)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งหน้าตั้งตารอคอย (tang-na-tang-ta ro-khoi)

words.definition: To discover a fact or piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: Visit our website to find out more details.
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຮູ້ / ຄົ້ນພົບ (xok hu / khon phob)
words.thaiTranslation: ค้นพบ / หาความจริง (khon-pohb / ha khwam-ching)

words.definition: To treat or describe something bad or unpleasant as if it were not serious, in order to avoid dealing with it.
words.exampleSentence: The report completely glossed over the company's financial failures.
words.laoTranslation: ມອງຂ້າມ / ປົກປິດຄວາມຜິດ (mong kham / pok pid khuam phid)
words.thaiTranslation: มองข้ามความผิด / กลบเกลื่อน (mong kham khwam phit / klop-kluan)

words.definition: To obtain or win something with a lot of effort; or to make a small supply last a long time.
words.exampleSentence: They managed to eke out a living on a very small piece of land.
words.laoTranslation: ດິ້ນຮົນເພື່ອຫາລ້ຽງຊີບ (din hon pheua ha liang xip)
words.thaiTranslation: กระเบียดกระเสียน / หาเลี้ยงชีพด้วยความยากลำบาก (kra-biat-kra-sian)

words.definition: To waste money, time, or an opportunity little by little on unimportant things.
words.exampleSentence: He frittered away his inheritance on expensive gadgets and parties.
words.laoTranslation: ເສຍ...ໄປກັບສິ່ງບໍ່ມີປະໂຫຍດ (sia ... pai kab sing bor mi pa-nyot)
words.thaiTranslation: ผลาญเงินหรือเวลาไปกับสิ่งไร้สาระ (phlan ngen rue we-la)

words.definition: Having or expressing more than one possible meaning, sometimes intentionally.
words.exampleSentence: The contractor's response was ambiguous, leaving us unsure of the final price.
words.laoTranslation: ກຳກວມ / ບໍ່ຊັດເຈນ (kam kuam / bor sad chen)
words.thaiTranslation: กำกวม / ไม่ชัดเจน (kam-kuam / mai chat-chen)

words.definition: Lasting only a short time or using few words.
words.exampleSentence: The manager gave a brief presentation before the main meeting began.
words.laoTranslation: ສັ້ນໆ / ຫຍໍ້ (san san / nyo)
words.thaiTranslation: สั้นๆ / สังเขป (san-san / sang-khep)

words.definition: An agreement in an argument achieved by each side changing or giving up some demands.
words.exampleSentence: After hours of negotiation, they finally reached a compromise.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະນີປະນອມ (kan pa-ni pa-nom)
words.thaiTranslation: การประนีประนอม (kan pra-ni-pra-nom)

words.definition: To notice or understand the difference between two things.
words.exampleSentence: It's sometimes difficult to distinguish between lookalike species.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຳແນກ / ແຍກແຍະ (cham naek / yaek yae)
words.thaiTranslation: จำแนก / แยกแยะ (cham-naek / yaek-yae)

words.definition: To judge or calculate the quality, importance, amount, or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: We need to evaluate the results of the marketing campaign.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຜົນ (pa-moen phon)

words.exampleSentence: Charles is a frequent visitor to our local library.
words.laoTranslation: ດຸໝັ່ນ / ເລື້ອຍໆ (du man / leuay leuay)
words.thaiTranslation: บ่อยครั้ง / เป็นประจำ (boi-khrang / pen pra-cham)

words.definition: A promise that something will be done or will happen, especially in writing.
words.exampleSentence: The electronic brand offers a two-year guarantee on all laptops.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບປະກັນ (hab pa-kan)
words.thaiTranslation: รับประกัน / การันตี (rap-pra-kan / ka-ran-ti)

words.definition: To pause before you do or say something, often because you are uncertain.
words.exampleSentence: If you need any help, please do not hesitate to ask.

words.definition: To decide on or explain the meaning of something.
words.exampleSentence: How do you interpret the latest sales numbers?
words.laoTranslation: ແປ / ຕີຄວາມໝາຍ (pae / ti khuam mai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตีความ / แปลความหมาย (ti-khwam / plae khwam-mai)

words.definition: To take a longer time than necessary to leave or disappear.
words.exampleSentence: The smell of fresh coffee lingered in the kitchen for hours.
words.laoTranslation: ອ້ອຍອິ່ງ / ຍັງເຫຼືອຢູ່ (oy ing / nyang leuah yu)
words.thaiTranslation: อ้อยอิ่ง / ยังเหลืออยู่ (oi-ing / yang luea yu)

words.definition: To change something slightly, especially to improve it or make it more acceptable.
words.exampleSentence: We had to modify our travel plans due to the weather warning.
words.laoTranslation: ດັດແປງ / ປ່ຽນແປງ (dat paeng / piang paeng)
words.thaiTranslation: ดัดแปลง / แก้ไขเล็กน้อย (dat-plaeng / kae-khai lek-noi)

words.definition: Based on real facts and not influenced by personal beliefs or feelings.
words.exampleSentence: A judge must remain completely objective throughout the entire trial.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນກາງ / ເປົ້າໝາຍ (pen kang / pao mai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นกลาง / วัตถุประสงค์ (pen klang / wat-thu-pra-song)

words.definition: To say that an event or action will happen in the future.
words.exampleSentence: Meteorologists predict a heavy storm later tonight.
words.laoTranslation: ທຳນາຍ / ຄາດເດົາ (tham nai / khat dao)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำนาย / คาดเดา (tham-nai / khat-dao)

words.definition: Not wanting to do something and therefore slow to do it.
words.exampleSentence: Many parents are reluctant to let their children play dangerous sports.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ເຕັມໃຈ / ລັງເລ (bor tem chai / lang le)
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่เต็มใจ / ไม่เต็มใจทำ (mai tem-chai / rang-re)

words.exampleSentence: She accepted the job offer with alacrity and packed her bags.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມກະຕືລືລົ້ນຢ່າງວ່ອງໄວ (khuam ka-teu-leu-lon yang wong wai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความกระตือรือร้นและว่องไว (khwam kra-tue-rue-ron lae wong-wai)

words.definition: Understanding or having knowledge of something.
words.exampleSentence: We should be fully cognizant of the legal risks before launching the app.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້ / ຮູ້ເຖິງ (hab hu / hu theung)
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้ / รับรู้ (tra-nak ru / rap-ru)

words.definition: Giving too much attention to small details and wanting everything to be perfect.
words.exampleSentence: He is so fastidious about his clothes that everything must be perfectly pressed.
words.laoTranslation: ຈູ້ຈີ້ / ລະອຽດລະອໍເກີນໄປ (chu chi / la-iad la-or koen pai)
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถันมาก / เจ้าระเบียบ (phi-thi-phi-than mak / chao-ra-biap)

words.definition: Never stopping, especially in an annoying or unpleasant way.
words.exampleSentence: The incessant noise from the nearby construction area kept us awake all night.
words.laoTranslation: ຕໍ່ເນື່ອງບໍ່ຢຸດ (tor neuang bor yut)
words.thaiTranslation: ต่อเนื่องไม่หยุดหย่อน (to-nuang mai yut-yon)

words.definition: Having a very harmful effect on somebody/something, especially in a gradual, unnoticeable way.
words.exampleSentence: Fake news has a pernicious influence on democratic elections.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນອັນຕະລາຍຮ້າຍແຮງແບບມິດ (pen an-ta-lai hai haeng baep mit)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นอันตรายร้ายแรงและซ่อนเร้น (pen an-ta-rai rai-raeng lae son-ren)

words.definition: Tending not to speak very much, in a way that seems unfriendly.
words.exampleSentence: My grandfather was a taciturn man who rarely shared his feelings.
words.laoTranslation: ປາກໜັກ / ບໍ່ຄ່ອຍເວົ້າ (pak nak / bor khoy wao)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบขรึม / ไม่ค่อยพูด (ngiep-khruem / mai khoi phut)

words.definition: To try as hard as you can to achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: Don't worry about the final score; just do your best.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ດີທີ່ສຸດ (het hai di thi sut)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ดีที่สุด (tham hai di thi-sut)

words.definition: To choose something after thinking about the possibilities.
words.exampleSentence: It is time for us to make a decision about our next venue.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ (tat sin chai)

words.definition: To take a risk in the hope of achieving a good result.
words.exampleSentence: You should take a chance and apply for that international scholarship.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ຽງເບິ່ງ (siang beung)
words.thaiTranslation: เสี่ยงดู / ลองเสี่ยงโชค (siang-du)

words.definition: To maintain regular communication with someone.
words.exampleSentence: Let's keep in touch after you move back to your hometown.
words.laoTranslation: ຕິດຕໍ່ກັນຢູ່ເລື້ອຍໆ (tit tor kan yu leuay leuay)
words.thaiTranslation: ติดต่อกันอยู่เสมอ (tit-to kan yu sa-moe)

words.definition: To say something nice to someone to show praise or admiration.
words.exampleSentence: He paid her a lovely compliment on her presentation skills.
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวชม / ชมเชย (klao-chom / chom-choei)

words.definition: To remember or consider a specific piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: Bear in mind that offices are closed on national holidays.
words.laoTranslation: ຈື່ໄວ້ / ຄຳນຶງເຖິງ (cheu wai / kham neung theung)
words.thaiTranslation: จำใส่ใจไว้ / คำนึงถึง (cham sai-chai wai / kham-nueng theung)

words.definition: A large number of vehicles on the road causing slow movement.
words.exampleSentence: I missed my early flight due to heavy traffic on the expressway.
words.laoTranslation: ລົດຕິດຫຼາຍ (lot tit lai)
words.thaiTranslation: รถติดมาก / การจราจรติดขัด (rot-tit mak)

words.definition: Very structures or conditions that are not expected to happen.
words.exampleSentence: It is highly unlikely that the project will be finished early.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້ຍາກຫຼາຍ (pen pai dai nyak lai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปได้ยากมาก (pen-pai-dai yak mak)

words.definition: To decide on something that you hope to achieve.
words.exampleSentence: You must set a goal if you want to stay motivated during your studies.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງເປົ້າໝາຍ (tang pao mai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งเป้าหมาย (tang pao-mai)

words.definition: To acquire a deep understanding of a complex situation or issue.
words.exampleSentence: The user research helped us gain insight into consumer behavior.
words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບຄວາມຮູ້ຄວາມເຂົ້າໃຈເລິກເຊິ່ງ (dai hab khuam hu khuam khao chai lek seng)
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับความเข้าใจลึกซึ้ง (dai-rap khwam-khao-chai luek-sueng)

words.definition: To make people feel more comfortable in a social situation.
words.exampleSentence: A quick introductory game is an excellent way to break the ice.
words.laoTranslation: ທຳລາຍຄວາມອຶດອັດ / ເລີ່ມຕົ້ນເຮັດຄວາມລຸ້ນເຄີຍ (tham lai khuam eut at)
words.thaiTranslation: ละลายพฤติกรรม / ทำความคุ้นเคย (la-lai phruet-ti-kam)

words.definition: An overwhelming or very large percentage of a group.
words.exampleSentence: The vast majority of employees voted in favor of the new policy.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ວນໃຫຍ່ສ່ວນຫຼາຍ (suan yai suan lai)
words.thaiTranslation: ส่วนใหญ่เป็นส่วนมาก (suan-yai pen suan-mak)

words.definition: To deal with a difficult situation or problem directly.
words.exampleSentence: Our sales team will face a massive challenge this quarter.
words.laoTranslation: ເຜີຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ (pheu xin na kab khuam tha thai)
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย (pha-choen-na kap khwam-tha-thai)

words.definition: To expand your knowledge, experience, or understanding of the world.
words.exampleSentence: Traveling alone across Asia will certainly broaden your horizons.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດຫູເປີດຕາ / ເປີດໂລກກະທັດ (poet hu poet ta)
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดหูเปิดตา / เปิดโลกทัศน์ (poet-hu-poet-ta)

words.definition: An unfair comparison or distinction that is likely to cause resentment or anger.
words.exampleSentence: The manager made an invidious distinction between the senior workers.
words.laoTranslation: ການປຽບທຽບທີ່ບໍ່ຍຸດຕິທຳແລະພາໃຫ້ຜິດຖຽງກັນ (kan piap thiap thi bor yut-ti-tham)
words.thaiTranslation: การเปรียบเทียบที่ไม่เป็นธรรมและก่อให้เกิดความแตกแยก (kan priap-thiap)

words.definition: Very strong proof that completely convinces you that something is true.
words.exampleSentence: The prosecutors presented compelling evidence that linked him to the scene.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼັກຖານທີ່ໜັກແໜ້ນແລະໜ້າເຊື່ອຖື (lak than thi nak naen)
words.thaiTranslation: หลักฐานที่แน่นหนาและน่าเชื่อถือ (lak-than thi naen-na)

words.definition: Completely wrong about a situation or a fact, with potentially serious consequences.
words.exampleSentence: If you think the market will recover instantly, you are gravely mistaken.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າໃຈຜິດຢ່າງຮ້າຍແຮງ (khao chai phid yang hai haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: เข้าใจผิดอย่างมหันต์ (khao-chai phit yang ma-han)

words.definition: An obvious, shameless, and total lack of respect or care for rules or feelings.
words.exampleSentence: The driver showed a blatant disregard for safety regulations.
words.laoTranslation: ການເມີນເສີຍ / ລະເລີຍຢ່າງຈະແຈ້ງ (kan moen soei / la loei yang cha chaeng)
words.thaiTranslation: การเพิกเฉยอย่างชัดเจนไร้ยางอาย (kan phoek-choei)

words.definition: Severe or radical actions taken to solve a critical issue.
words.exampleSentence: The government took drastic measures to curb hyperinflation.
words.laoTranslation: ມາດຕະການຂັ້ນຮຸນແຮງ (mat-ta-kan khan hun haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: มาตรการขั้นรุนแรง / ยาแรง (mat-tra-kan khan run-raeng)

words.definition: A state of mental discomfort caused by holding two conflicting beliefs simultaneously.
words.exampleSentence: Smoking despite knowing it causes cancer creates heavy cognitive dissonance.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຂັດແຍ່ງທາງຈິດໃຈ (khuam khat nyaeng thang chit chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความย้อนแย้งทางความคิด / ความไม่สอดคล้องทางพุทธิปัญญา (khwam yon-yaeng)

words.definition: To stop trying to do something, often because it is too difficult.
words.exampleSentence: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how hard it gets.
words.laoTranslation: ຍອມແພ້ / ເຊົາພະຍາຍາມ (nyom phae / xao pha-nya-nyam)
words.thaiTranslation: ยอมแพ้ / ล้มเลิก (yom-phae / lom-loek)

words.definition: To reject or refuse an offer, request, or application.
words.exampleSentence: She turned down the job offer because the salary was too low.
You must carry on with your studies even when it is boring.
words.laoTranslation: ດຳເນີນຕໍ່ໄປ / ເຮັດຕໍ່ໄປ (dam noen tor pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำต่อไป / ดำเนินต่อไป (tham to-pai)

words.definition: To leave the ground and fly (for aircraft), or to become successful quickly.
words.exampleSentence: The plane took off exactly on schedule despite the heavy rain.
words.laoTranslation: ບິນຂຶ້ນ / ປະສົບຄວາມສຳເລັດໄວ (bin khuen)
words.thaiTranslation: บินขึ้น / ประสบความสำเร็จอย่างรวดเร็ว (bin-khuen)

words.definition: To wait for a short time, or to grip something tightly.
words.exampleSentence: Please hold on for a moment while I check your file.
words.laoTranslation: ຖ້າບຶດໜຶ່ງ / ຈັບໄວ້ໃຫ້ແໜ້ນ (tha beut neung)
words.thaiTranslation: รอสักครู่ / จับไว้ให้แน่น (ro sak-khru)

words.definition: To investigate or examine the facts about a problem or situation.
words.exampleSentence: The technical support team is looking into the server issue right now.
words.laoTranslation: ກວດສອບ / ສືບສວນ (kuat sop / sieb suan)
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบ / สอบสวนหาความจริง (truat-sop)

words.definition: To have a friendly relationship with someone.
words.exampleSentence: Do you get along with your new office colleagues?
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າກັນໄດ້ດີ (khao kan dai di)
words.thaiTranslation: เข้ากันได้ดีกับ... (khao-kan-dai-di)

words.definition: To suddenly refuse to speak, typically because of nervousness, fear, or secrets.
words.exampleSentence: As soon as the investigators started asking about the money, he clammed up.
words.laoTranslation: ມິດງຽບທັນທີ / ບໍ່ຍອມເວົ້າ (mit ngiep than ti / bor nyom wao)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบสนิท / ปิดปากเงียบไม่ยอมพูด (ngiep sa-nit)

words.definition: To gradually decrease, become smaller or weaker, and then stop completely.
words.exampleSentence: The protest path petered out as the heavy rainfall began.
words.laoTranslation: ຄ່ອຍໆໝົດໄປ / ມອດລົງ (khoy khoy mot pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ค่อยๆ หมดไป / แผ่วลงจนเงียบหายไป (khoi-khoi mot-pai)

words.definition: To talk or complain about something repeatedly and in an annoying way.
words.exampleSentence: I know I made a mistake, but you don't need to keep harping on it.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າຊ້ຳໆຊາກໆ / ຈົ່ມເລື້ອຍໆ (wao sam sam xak xak)
words.thaiTranslation: พูดซ้ำซาก / บ่นเรื่องเดิมๆ ไม่รู้จบ (phut sam-sak)

words.definition: Correct, exact, and without any mistakes.
words.exampleSentence: The weather forecast was surprisingly accurate.
words.thaiTranslation: ถูกต้อง / แม่นยำ

words.definition: To have enough money to buy something.
words.exampleSentence: I cannot afford to buy a new car this year.
words.laoTranslation: ຊື້ໄດ້/ມີເງິນພໍ
words.thaiTranslation: ซื้อได้ / มีเงินพอซื้อ

words.definition: From a long time ago; very old.
words.exampleSentence: They visited an ancient temple in the jungle.
words.thaiTranslation: โบราณ / เก่าแก่

words.exampleSentence: He felt anxious about the upcoming English exam.
words.thaiTranslation: วิตกกังวล / กังวลใจ

words.definition: To plan or organize something in advance.
words.exampleSentence: Can we arrange a meeting for next Monday?
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດແຈງ / ຈັດວາງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดการ / จัดเตรียม

words.definition: Something on sale at a lower price than its true value.
words.exampleSentence: This jacket was a real bargain at only ten dollars.
words.laoTranslation: ຂອງຖືກ / ລາຄາຖືກ
words.thaiTranslation: ของถูก / สินค้าราคาพิเศษ

words.definition: To act in a particular way, normally good.
words.exampleSentence: The children behaved very well at the restaurant.
words.laoTranslation: ປະພຶດ / ວางຕົວ
words.thaiTranslation: ประพฤติตน / วางตัวดี

words.definition: To take something to use and return it later.
words.exampleSentence: May I borrow your pen for a second?

words.definition: A period of one hundred years.
words.exampleSentence: This church was built in the nineteenth century.
words.thaiTranslation: ศตวรรษ (รอบ 100 ปี)

words.definition: Something new and difficult which requires effort.
words.exampleSentence: Learning a new language is a great challenge.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທ້າທาย
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งท้าทาย

words.definition: To say that something is wrong or not good.
words.exampleSentence: Customers complain about the slow internet service.
words.laoTranslation: ຈົ່ມ / ຮ້ອງທຸກ
words.thaiTranslation: บ่น / ร้องเรียน

words.definition: To state or prove that an arrangement is true.
words.exampleSentence: Please call to confirm your flight reservation.

words.definition: Very pleased and happy about something.
words.exampleSentence: She was delighted with her birthday gifts.
words.thaiTranslation: ยินดีอย่างยิ่ง / ดีใจมาก

words.definition: To say what someone or something is like.
words.exampleSentence: Can you describe the man you saw yesterday?
words.laoTranslation: ອະທິບາຍ / ພັນລະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: อธิบาย / บรรยายลักษณะ

words.definition: The place where someone or something is going.
words.exampleSentence: Spain is a popular holiday destination for tourists.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຸດໝາຍປາຍທາງ
words.thaiTranslation: จุดหมายปลายทาง

words.definition: The process of finding information for the first time.
words.exampleSentence: The discovery of America changed world history.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄົ້ນພົບ

words.definition: To receive money as payment for work that you do.
words.exampleSentence: How much does a beginner teacher earn there?
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับรายได้ / หาเงินได้

words.definition: To give someone support, confidence, or hope.
words.exampleSentence: My parents always encourage me to study hard.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ກຳລັງໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ให้กำลังใจ / สนับสนุน

words.definition: The air, water, and land in which people live.
words.exampleSentence: We must do more to protect our natural environment.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: Easy to recognize because of being seen before.
words.exampleSentence: Your face looks familiar, have we met before?
words.thaiTranslation: คุ้นเคย / เคยเห็น

words.definition: Willing to give money, help, or kindness freely.
words.exampleSentence: It was very generous of you to buy me lunch.
words.thaiTranslation: ใจกว้าง / เอื้อเฟื้อ

words.definition: To make something better than it was before.
words.exampleSentence: I practice English every day to improve my skills.
words.laoTranslation: ປັບປຸງ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ດີຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ปรับปรุง / ทำให้ดีขึ้น

words.definition: One of the foods that you use to make a dish.
words.exampleSentence: Flour is the main ingredient in making bread.
words.thaiTranslation: ส่วนผสม / วัตถุดิบ

words.definition: A person who lives next to or near you.
words.exampleSentence: Our new neighbor invited us over for a tea.
words.laoTranslation: ເພື່ອນບ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: เพื่อนบ้าน

words.definition: Completely different or facing something else.
words.exampleSentence: The bookstore is on the opposite side of the road.
words.laoTranslation: ກົງກັນຂ້າມ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรงกันข้าม

words.definition: To get or be given something by someone.
words.exampleSentence: Did you receive the email I sent this morning?

words.definition: To make something smaller in size or amount.
words.exampleSentence: The shop decided to reduce prices by ten percent.
words.thaiTranslation: ลดลง / ลดราคา

words.definition: To start a machine or light by a switch.
words.exampleSentence: Could you turn on the light? It's dark.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດໄຟ / ເປີດເຄື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิด (ไฟ, เครื่องใช้ไฟฟ้า)

words.definition: To stop a machine or light by a switch.
words.exampleSentence: Remember to turn off the TV before going to bed.
words.laoTranslation: ປິດໄຟ / ປິດເຄື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ปิด (ไฟ, เครื่องใช้ไฟฟ้า)

words.definition: To open your eyes and awake after sleeping.
words.exampleSentence: I usually wake up at 6 AM every morning.

words.definition: To change from being a child to being an adult.
words.exampleSentence: He grew up in a small village in Laos.
words.thaiTranslation: เติบโต / โตขึ้น

words.definition: To try to find someone or something.
words.exampleSentence: I am looking for my keys. Have you seen them?
words.thaiTranslation: มองหา / ค้นหา

words.definition: To establish or start a business or system.
words.exampleSentence: She wants to set up her own coffee shop.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງຂຶ້ນ / ຈັດຕັ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตั้ง / ตั้งค่า / เริ่มต้นธุรกิจ

words.definition: To do something incorrectly or error.
words.exampleSentence: It's okay to make a mistake when learning.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດຜິດພາດ

words.definition: To stop working or resting for a short time.
words.exampleSentence: Let's take a break and grab some fresh coffee.
words.laoTranslation: ພັກຜ່ອນບຶດໜຶ່ງ
words.thaiTranslation: หยุดพักผ่อน (ชั่วคราว)

words.definition: To become sick with a common cold virus.
words.exampleSentence: Wear a jacket or you will catch a cold outside.
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นหวัด / ติดหวัด

words.definition: To help someone with a physical task.
words.exampleSentence: Could you give a hand with these heavy boxes?
words.thaiTranslation: ช่วยเหลือ / ยื่นมือช่วย

words.definition: To take a short, relaxed walk for exercise.
words.exampleSentence: The weather is lovely, let's go for a walk.
words.laoTranslation: ໄປຍ่างຫຼິ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ไปเดินเล่น

words.definition: To contact someone by phone or email.
words.exampleSentence: I will get in touch with you as soon as I arrive.

words.definition: To say something that is not true.
words.exampleSentence: It is wrong to tell a lie to your friends.
words.laoTranslation: ຕົວະ / ເວົ້າຕົວະ

words.definition: To talk to someone in a friendly, informal way.
words.exampleSentence: We sat down to have a chat about our holidays.
words.laoTranslation: ລົມກັນຫຼິ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: พูดคุยกัน (แบบเป็นกันเอง)

words.definition: To improve or develop over a period of time.
words.exampleSentence: Your English speaking skills are making progress.
words.laoTranslation: ມີຄວາມກ້າວໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: มีความก้าวหน้า / พัฒนาขึ้น

words.definition: To write down information during a lecture.
words.exampleSentence: Make sure to take notes during the lecture.

words.definition: To remember a piece of important information.
words.exampleSentence: Keep in mind that the museum is closed Mondays.
words.thaiTranslation: จำไว้ / คำนึงถึง

words.exampleSentence: He lost his temper when the computer crashed.
words.laoTranslation: ສູນ / ເສຍອາລົມ
words.thaiTranslation: อารมณ์เสีย / โมโห

words.definition: To book a table, room, or ticket in advance.
words.exampleSentence: I need to make a reservation for dinner tonight.
words.laoTranslation: ຈອງລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: จองล่วงหน้า

words.definition: All the bags and suitcases you take on a journey.
words.exampleSentence: You can check your baggage at the airport counter.
words.laoTranslation: ກະເປົາເດີນທາງ (ka-pao doen thang)
words.thaiTranslation: สัมภาระ / กระเป๋าเดินทาง (sam-pha-ra)

words.exampleSentence: We had a delightful evening chatting with local friends.
words.laoTranslation: ໜ້າເພີດເພີນ (na phoet phoen)
words.thaiTranslation: น่ารื่นรมย์ / ยินดียิ่ง (na ruen-rom)

words.definition: Belonging to or coming from another country.
words.exampleSentence: Learning a foreign language requires daily practice.
words.laoTranslation: ຕ່າງປະເທດ (tang pa-thet)
words.thaiTranslation: ต่างประเทศ (tang-pra-thet)

words.definition: To collect several things together in one place.

words.definition: To think that something is true, correct, or real.

words.definition: A person who buys goods or services from a shop or business.

words.definition: The amount of space between two places.

words.definition: A system of communication used by a particular country or community.

words.definition: A cause, explanation, or justification for an action or event.

I need to go online to run the Earth Engine script.

words.definition: More important than anything else; supreme.

words.exampleSentence: Dry organic residue can catch fire easily during peak dry season.

words.definition: To experience a failure or mistake; to deviate from plan.

words.exampleSentence: We ruled out the possibility of failure.
The new policy brought about significant changes.
The event turned out to be a success.

words.definition: To rigorously evaluate dense background qualitative text matrices or raw files to discover key salient elements.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way

words.definition: The action of improving or enhancing the quality or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: Soil enrichment via natural compost boosts the chemical profile of medicinal plants.
words.laoTranslation: ການປັບປຸງໃຫ້ອຸດົມສົມບູນ
words.thaiTranslation: การเพิ่มพูน / การทำให้บริบูรณ์

words.definition: A person who is concerned about the environment
words.exampleSentence: Environmentalists are calling for stricter pollution laws.
words.laoTranslation: ນັກສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: นักสิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: The removal of contaminants or impurities from something.
words.exampleSentence: The essential oil extraction line requires a final purification stage.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດໃຫ້ບໍລິສຸດ / ການກັ່ນຕອງ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้บริสุทธิ์ / การกลั่นกรอง

words.definition: The quality of having a documented history of production or source tracking.
words.exampleSentence: Standard quality certification requires full traceability of the raw materials.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມສາມາດໃນການຕິດຕາມແຫຼ່ງທີ່ມາ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสามารถในการตรวจสอบย้อนกลับ

words.exampleSentence: Oil is a globally traded commodity.
words.thaiTranslation: สินค้าโภคภัณฑ์

words.exampleSentence: We collected data for the study.

words.definition: The most favorable conditions or amount for obtaining a given result.
words.exampleSentence: Maintaining the optimum temperature is critical for black garlic fermentation.
words.laoTranslation: ລະດັບທີ່ເໝາະສົມທີ່ສຸດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระดับที่เหมาะสมที่สุด / จุดที่คุ้มค่าที่สุด

words.definition: Available for purchase, often at a reduced price.
words.exampleSentence: The newly packaged wellness teas will go on sale next month.
words.laoTranslation: ວາງຈໍາໜ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: วางจำหน่าย

words.definition: A formal arrangement between two nations or parties regarding trade or cooperation.
words.exampleSentence: The two neighbors signed a bilateral agreement to ease agricultural customs tariffs.
words.laoTranslation: ສັນຍາສອງຝ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อตกลงทวิภาคี

words.definition: A certificate showing that a government or company has paid to remove a certain amount of carbon dioxide from the environment.
words.exampleSentence: Generating a certified carbon credit provides a reliable alternative income stream for smallholders.
words.laoTranslation: ສິນເຊື່ອກາກບອນ
words.thaiTranslation: คาร์บอนเครดิต

words.definition: A specific plan or system modified to fit the exact needs of a user.
words.exampleSentence: AppSheet allowed us to build a customized solution for tracking field data.
words.laoTranslation: ການແກ້ໄຂບັນຫາທີ່ປັບແຕ່ງສະເພາະ
words.thaiTranslation: แนวทางแก้ไขที่ปรับแต่งเฉพาะ

words.definition: The process of assigning monetary value to environmental or business factors.
words.exampleSentence: Conducting an economic valuation of ecosystem services helps secure green funds.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະເມີນມູນຄ່າທາງເສດຖະກິດ
words.thaiTranslation: การประเมินมูลค่าทางเศรษฐกิจ

words.definition: A metabolic process that converts sugar to acids, gases, or alcohol via microbes.
words.exampleSentence: The strict heat profile during the fermentation process changes garlic into black garlic.
words.laoTranslation: ຂະບວນການໝັກ
words.thaiTranslation: กระบวนการหมัก

words.definition: The construction and upgrade of physical networks like roads, power, and rails.
words.exampleSentence: The railway line marks a major step in regional infrastructural development.
words.laoTranslation: ການພັດທະນາໂຄງລ່າງພື້ນຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: การพัฒนาโครงสร้างพื้นฐาน

words.definition: The ability of an organization or university to complete core tasks effectively.
words.exampleSentence: The grant was designed to boost the institutional capacity for scientific research.
words.laoTranslation: ຂີດຄວາມສາມາດຂອງອົງກອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขีดความสามารถขององค์กร

words.definition: The coordinated system of shipping, warehousing, and tracking assets.
words.exampleSentence: A solid logistical network prevents fresh agricultural products from rotting.
words.laoTranslation: ເຄືອຂ່າຍການຂົນສົ່ງສິນຄ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เครือข่ายโลจิสติกส์

words.definition: A small-scale preliminary test designed to evaluate project feasibility.
words.exampleSentence: We initiated a pilot study to test user responses to the roselle cosmetic line.
words.laoTranslation: ການສຶກສາທົດລອງ
words.thaiTranslation: การศึกษาขอบข่ายนำร่อง

words.definition: A statistical model used to forecast future outcomes or environmental changes.
words.exampleSentence: We developed a predictive model to assess how climate shifts affect tea farms.
words.laoTranslation: ແບບຈໍາລອງການຄາດຄະເນ
words.thaiTranslation: แบบจำลองการคาดการณ์

words.definition: The rate or efficiency at which agricultural or business goods are generated.
words.exampleSentence: Adding organic biochar significantly elevated the soil productivity level.
words.laoTranslation: ລະດັບສະມັດຖະພາບການຜະລິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ระดับผลิตภาพ / ระดับความสามารถในการผลิต

words.definition: The mental ability to switch between thinking about two different concepts.
words.exampleSentence: Critical thinking training sharpens a planner's cognitive flexibility during crises.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຢືດຢຸ່ນທາງດ້ານສະຕິປັນຍາ
words.thaiTranslation: ความยืดหยุ่นทางสติปัญญา

words.definition: A long-term line of development that preserves resources for the future.
words.exampleSentence: The eco-friendly timber program sets the rural forest on a sustainable trajectory.
words.laoTranslation: ເສັ້ນທາງການພັດທະນາແບບຍືນຍົງ
words.thaiTranslation: แนวทางการพัฒนาที่ยั่งยืน

words.definition: To explain or be responsible for
words.exampleSentence: We must account for every expense in the budget.
We cleared up the misunderstanding.
We drew on our experience.

words.definition: To examine a large amount of information very thoroughly to find key points.
words.exampleSentence: Researchers must sift through large batches of satellite imagery to map canopy loss.
words.laoTranslation: ຄົ້ນຫາຢ່າງລະອຽດ / ຄັດຈ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: คัดแยกอย่างละเอียด / ตรวจสอบอย่างถี่ถ้วน

words.definition: To replant an area of land with trees after the previous cover was removed.
words.exampleSentence: Local communities plan to reforest degraded watersheds along the railway corridor.
words.laoTranslation: ປູກປ່າທົດແທນ
words.thaiTranslation: ปลูกป่าทดแทน

words.definition: Lack of equality or equivalence between parts or aspects of something.
words.exampleSentence: Market asymmetry often leaves smallholder garlic farmers at a disadvantage.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມບໍ່ສົມດຸນ / ຄວາມບໍ່ສະເໝີພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: ความไม่สมดุล / ความไม่เท่าเทียม

words.definition: The state or condition of living or existing together at the same time or in the same place.
words.exampleSentence: The seminar explored the coexistence of traditional farming and high-tech agritourism.
words.laoTranslation: ການຢູ່ຮ່ວມກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การอยู่ร่วมกัน

words.definition: To inform a person of a danger or problem before it occurs.
words.exampleSentence: Early warning apps forewarn horticulturists about impending flash floods.
words.laoTranslation: ເຕືອນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: เตือนล่วงหน้า

words.definition: Below the usual or required level of quality or structural safety.
words.exampleSentence: Customs officials reject agricultural shipments that use substandard packaging.
words.laoTranslation: ຕໍ່າກວ່າພາລະດັບ / ບໍ່ໄດ້ມາດຕະຖານ
words.thaiTranslation: ต่ำกว่ามาตรฐาน / ไม่ได้มาตรฐาน

words.definition: Not capable of working, growing, or developing successfully.
words.exampleSentence: Without deep well irrigation, expanding okra farming in this dry zone is nonviable.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ສາມາດເປັນໄປໄດ້ຕົວຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่สามารถเป็นไปได้จริง / ไม่รอด

words.definition: The process of making something secure, steady, or unfluctuating.
words.exampleSentence: Price stabilization policies prevent extreme spikes in local chili markets.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດໃຫ້ໝັ້ນຄົງ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำให้มั่นคง / การสร้างเสถียรภาพ

words.definition: To enlarge or vary the range of products, crops, or field investments.
words.exampleSentence: Farmers are encouraged to diversify their plots by intercropping roselle with timber.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຫຼາກຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้หลากหลาย / กระจายความเสี่ยง

words.exampleSentence: We need clarity on this issue.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: ความชัดเจน

words.definition: The process of gathering mature crops
words.exampleSentence: The farmers are busy with the harvest.
words.laoTranslation: ການເກັບກ່ຽວ
words.thaiTranslation: การเก็บเกี่ยว

words.exampleSentence: The company's main asset is its skilled workforce.
The government provided subsidies for renewable energy.
words.laoTranslation: ເງິນອຸດໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: เงินอุดหนุน

words.exampleSentence: We meet our quota for the month.

words.definition: To estimate or determine the monetary worth or commercial value of an item.
words.exampleSentence: The team will valuate the carbon storage capacity of the native forest zone.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນມູນຄ່າ
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินมูลค่า

words.definition: To perform a sequence of actions in order to achieve a particular goal.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives must take steps to comply with regional packaging standards.
words.laoTranslation: ດໍາເນີນມາດຕະການ / ລົງມືເຮັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ดำเนินการ / ลงมือจัดการ

words.definition: Available for immediate sale or use in a warehouse or shop.
words.exampleSentence: The local distributor currently has premium biochar kilns in stock.
words.laoTranslation: ມີໃນສາງ / ມີພ້ອມຈໍາໜ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: มีในคลัง / มีพร้อมขาย

words.definition: A monetary benefit offered to encourage specific actions or behaviors.
words.exampleSentence: Carbon offset payouts provide a strong financial incentive to avoid clear-cutting.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງຈູງໃຈທາງດ້ານການເງິນ
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งจูงใจทางการเงิน

words.definition: The structured process of translating a project idea into a concrete implementation design.
words.exampleSentence: During project formulation, identifying risk assumptions prevents future delays.
words.laoTranslation: ການກຳນົດໂຄງການ / ການຮ່າງໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: การจัดทำโครงการ / การวางแผนโครงการ

words.definition: Information that can be measured and written down accurately with numbers.
words.exampleSentence: The researchers collected quantitative data on soil nitrate levels over six months.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ມູນเชิงປະລິມານ / ຂໍ້ມູນຕົວເລກ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อมูลเชิงปริมาณ

words.definition: A high-level choice that alters long-term goals or resource allocations.
words.exampleSentence: Investing in local processing units instead of middleman sales was a strategic decision.
words.laoTranslation: ການຕັດສິນໃຈເຊີງຍຸດທະສາດ
words.thaiTranslation: การตัดสินใจเชิงกลยุทธ์

words.definition: To discover something valuable or interesting entirely by accident.
words.exampleSentence: While assessing mountain plots, foresters happened to stumble upon a rare native orchid.
words.laoTranslation: ພົບພໍ້ໂດຍບັງເອີນ
words.thaiTranslation: พบโดยบังเอิญ / บังเอิญเจอ

words.definition: Relating to or characteristic of regions bordering on the tropics, featuring distinct wet and dry spells.
words.exampleSentence: The northern highlands feature a subtropical environment suited for specialty root crop cultivation.
words.laoTranslation: ກິ່ງຮ້ອນຊຸ່ມ / ເຂດກິ່ງຮ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: กึ่งเขตร้อน

words.exampleSentence: We must reevaluate our strategy for the new market.
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินใหม่

words.definition: A failure to function normally or work correctly.
words.exampleSentence: A sudden software malfunction delayed our digital field data collection charts.
words.laoTranslation: ການເຮັດວຽກຜິດປົກກະຕິ / ເຄື່ອງຂັດຂ້ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: การทำงานผิดปกติ / เครื่องขัดข้อง

words.definition: Abnormally or excessively sensitive, either chemically or operationally.
words.exampleSentence: The electronic monitoring sensors are hypersensitive to changes in soil humidity.
words.laoTranslation: ອ່ອນໄຫວເກີນໄປ / ໄວຕໍ່ການກະຕຸ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ไวต่อสิ่งกระตุ้นเป็นพิเศษ / อ่อนไหวง่ายมาก

words.definition: Relating to conditions that affect hygiene and health, especially clean water.
words.exampleSentence: Meeting international sanitary standards is a strict prerequisite for cross-border trade.
words.laoTranslation: ຖືກຫຼັກອະນາໄມ / ສະອາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ถูกสุขอนามัย / สะอาดปลอดภัย

words.definition: Estimating or determining the magnitude, amount, or volume of something.
words.exampleSentence: The mobile tool is perfect for gauging overall canopy density values.
words.laoTranslation: ການວັດແທກ / ການປະເມີນ
words.thaiTranslation: การวัดขนาด / การประเมิน

words.definition: Any form of water falling from the sky
words.exampleSentence: The annual precipitation in this region is 400mm.
words.thaiTranslation: ปริมาณน้ำฝน

words.exampleSentence: We face a disadvantage.

words.definition: Not able to be foreseen or known beforehand, such as changing weather patterns or market prices.
words.exampleSentence: Smallholders face unpredictable weather anomalies that threaten secondary cash crop cultivation.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ບໍ່ສາມາດຄາດເດົາໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ไม่สามารถคาดเดาได้ / ผันผวน

words.definition: To become greater, more extreme, or more focused in execution.
words.exampleSentence: Cooperatives plan to intensify their roselle processing output to meet bilateral trade quotas.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ເຂັ້ມຂຸ້ນຂຶ້ນ / ເພີ່ມທະວີ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้รุนแรงขึ้น / เพิ่มความเข้มข้น

words.definition: The climate of a very small or restricted area, especially when this differs from the surrounding area.
words.exampleSentence: The dense canopy of the old-growth forest creates a humid microclimate ideal for wild medicinal herbs.
words.laoTranslation: ພູມອາກາດທ້ອງຖິ່ນສະເພາະ
words.thaiTranslation: ภูมิอากาศเฉพาะถิ่น

words.definition: Occurring or performed in the period immediately following the harvesting of a crop.
words.exampleSentence: Proper postharvest handling prevents roselle blossoms from spoiling during transit.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼັງການເກັບກ່ຽວ
words.thaiTranslation: หลังการเก็บเกี่ยว

words.definition: Active against bacteria or tending to destroy/inhibit their growth naturally.
words.exampleSentence: Black garlic contains active antibacterial compounds that enhance its wellness value.
words.laoTranslation: ຕ້ານແບັກທີເຣຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ต้านแบคทีเรีย

words.exampleSentence: Diversification reduces risk in investment.
words.laoTranslation: ການແຜ່ຂະຫຍາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การกระจายความเสี่ยง

words.definition: A land-use system that combines trees with crops or livestock
words.exampleSentence: Agroforestry practices enhance biodiversity and soil health.
words.laoTranslation: ກະສິກຳປ່າໄມ້

words.definition: To understand or explain something incorrectly, such as technical forestry charts or email instructions.
words.exampleSentence: Without a clear summary, stakeholders might misinterpret the satellite imagery data.
words.laoTranslation: ຕີຄວາມໝາຍຜິດ / ເຂົ້າໃຈຜິດ
words.thaiTranslation: ตีความหมายผิด / เข้าใจความหมายคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: To write a technical report, conference paper, or project brief jointly with another person.
words.exampleSentence: The advisors decided to coauthor the final evaluation report for the donor.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່ວມກັນຂຽນ / ຮ່ວมປະພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เขียนร่วมกัน / ร่วมแต่ง

words.definition: To take action in a presentation to prevent an expected question or criticism from arising.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote speaker used data to pre-empt objections about the project's high cost.
words.laoTranslation: ສະກັດກັ້ນໄວ້ລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดการล่วงหน้า / ป้องกันไว้ก่อน

words.definition: To split a major meeting agenda item or presentation into smaller, manageable tasks.
words.exampleSentence: Let us subdivide the technical framework section among the three working groups.
words.thaiTranslation: แบ่งย่อย / แยกออกเป็นส่วนย่อย

words.exampleSentence: We have social interaction with others.
words.thaiTranslation: ปฏิสัมพันธ์

words.definition: The action of making a statement or situation less confused and more comprehensible.
words.exampleSentence: The project leader sent an email seeking clarification on the timber tracking standards.
words.laoTranslation: ການອະທິບາຍໃຫ້ຈະແຈ້ງ / ຂໍ້ຄວາມກະຈ່າງແຈ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: การอธิบายให้ชัดเจน / การทำให้กระจ่าง

words.definition: Good at convincing someone to act or think in a certain way through eloquence.
words.exampleSentence: The advisor delivered a highly persuasive keynote speech on agricultural standards.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີທ່າແຮງໂນ້ມນ້າວ / ຊັກຊວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีโกนโน้มน้าว / โน้มน้าวใจได้ดี

words.definition: A skilled coordinator who guides a group discussion to reach consensus seamlessly.
words.exampleSentence: She acted as the facilitator for the cross-border logistics mapping workshop.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ອໍານວຍຄວາມສະດວກ / ຜູ້ດໍາເນີນລາຍການ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้อำนวยความสะดวก / ผู้ดำเนินรายการ

words.definition: Combine a number of components, data points, or herbal processing elements into a coherent whole.
words.exampleSentence: The junior advisor will synthesize all field reports into a final policy brief for the agency.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະ / ຮວບຮວມຂໍ້ມູນ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเคราะห์ / รวบรวมข้อมูลเป็นหนึ่งเดียว

words.definition: Having or showing a confident and forceful personality when leading group alignments.
words.exampleSentence: An assertive leader states team targets transparently without creating hostility.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເດັດຂາດ / ໝັ້ນໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ซึ่งยึดมั่นในสิทธิ์ / มั่นใจและเด็ดขาด

words.definition: A central theme or the main orchestrating speech delivered at a professional conference.
words.exampleSentence: The professor’s keynote focused on integrating satellite imagery with local forest preservation.
words.laoTranslation: ປາຖະກະຖາ / ຫົວຂໍ້ຫຼັກ
words.thaiTranslation: ปาฐกถาพิเศษ / สุนทรพจน์หลัก

words.definition: A general, collective agreement reached among all members of a working team.
words.exampleSentence: After two hours of intense debate, the board finally reached a firm consensus.
words.laoTranslation: ມະຕິເອກະພາບ / ຄວາມເຫັນພ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: ความเห็นพ้องต้องกัน / มติเอกฉันท์

words.definition: A set of rules for communication
words.exampleSentence: The internet protocol is TCP/IP.

words.definition: A meeting or medium where ideas and views on environmental or technical issues can be exchanged.
words.exampleSentence: The eco-tourism forum attracted stakeholders from transport and culture departments.
words.laoTranslation: ເວທີປຶກສາຫາລື / ກອງປະຊຸມເວທີ
words.thaiTranslation: เวทีสัมมนา / ฟอรัมแลกเปลี่ยนความคิดเห็น

words.exampleSentence: We wait a minute.
Please write your full address.

words.definition: To express an idea, feedback comment, or meeting point in an alternative, clearer way.
words.exampleSentence: Let me rephrase my earlier comment regarding the cross-border transit hours.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າຄືນໃໝ່ / ປ່ຽນຄໍາເວົ້າໃຫມ່
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวใหม่ / เรียบเรียงใหม่

words.definition: Agreed upon or participated in by three or more parties, such as regional cross-border trade accords.
words.exampleSentence: Advisors carefully reviewed the multilateral transit treaty governing logistics across the region.
words.laoTranslation: ພຫຸພາຄີ / ຫຼາຍຝ່າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: พหุภาคี / หลายฝ่าย

words.definition: To connect technical ideas, data systems, or organizational reports closely together.
words.exampleSentence: The report details how canopy density metrics interconnect with soil carbon levels.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊື່ອມໂຍງເຂົ້າກັນ / ພົວພັນກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมโยงเข้าด้วยกัน / สัมพันธ์กัน

words.definition: Not involving spoken language, such as using gestures or posture during presentations.
words.exampleSentence: A confident leader uses nonverbal cues to establish trust during a workshop keynote.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ມີວາຈາ / ບໍ່ໃຊ້ຄໍາເວົ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: อวัจนภาษา / ไม่ใช้คำพูด

words.exampleSentence: We contradicted the statement.
She articulated her views on the matter.
words.thaiTranslation: พูดจาชัดเจน

words.definition: The state of forming a united, integrated, and harmonized working team or report structure.
words.exampleSentence: Using structured transition phrases adds logical cohesion to your technical brief.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມກົມກຽວ / ຄວາມສາມັກຄີ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสถิต / ความสามัคคี / การเชื่อมโยงอย่างมีเหตุผล

words.definition: To complete the ultimate version of a trade contract, technical layout, or team agenda.
words.exampleSentence: We need an extra team synchronization session to finalize the standard protocols.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສໍາເລັດ / ສະຫຼຸບຂັ້ນສຸດທ້າຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์ / สรุปขั้นตอนสุดท้าย

words.definition: Fluent, elegant, and persuasive speaking ability demonstrated by keynote speakers.
words.exampleSentence: Her eloquence at the international forestry symposium won the support of foreign donors.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄ່ອງແຄ້ວສະຫຼະສະຫຼວຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสละสลวยทางภาษา / ความมีวาทศิลป์

words.definition: The arrangement or positioning of team workflows in accordance with corporate targets.
words.exampleSentence: Strategic alignment between regional advisors ensures smooth project implementation.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈັດວາງໃຫ້ສອດຄ່ອງກັນ
words.thaiTranslation: การจัดแนวทางให้ตรงกัน / การประสานสอดคล้อง

words.definition: Good reason or structural proof provided in a report to defend an infrastructure cost.
words.exampleSentence: The brief includes a clear economic justification based on calculated opportunity costs.
words.laoTranslation: ການໃຫ້ເຫດຜົນ / ຂໍ້ພິສູດ
words.thaiTranslation: การให้เหตุผลแนวคิด / ข้ออ้างอิงความชอบธรรม

words.exampleSentence: We convey our feelings.
We examine the structure of the building.
We write a summary of the article.
We need context to understand.
We speak in a calm tone during the meeting.

words.definition: The official written record of what was said, decided, and assigned at a meeting.
words.exampleSentence: The administrative assistant typed up the minutes and shared them via email.
words.laoTranslation: ບົດບັນທຶກກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: รายงานการประชุม

words.exampleSentence: We review the article for errors.
We discuss the issue at the meeting.
We care about our social status.
We deliver the package.
We need to resolve this conflict peacefully.

words.definition: A member of a selected group of experts who participates in a public forum debate.
words.exampleSentence: Each panelist has five minutes to deliver their opening perspective.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຮ່ວມອະພິປາຍ / ຄະນະກໍາມະການ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ร่วมอภิปราย / ผู้ร่วมเสวนาบนเวที

words.definition: To give a concise summary of the primary targets and indicators of a project.
words.exampleSentence: The purpose of this morning brief is to outline the goals of our new app.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເປົ້າໝາຍໃຫ້ຈະແຈ້ງ / ສະຫຼຸບເປົ້າຫມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปโครงร่างเป้าหมาย / กำหนดเป้าหมาย

words.definition: To stay focused on the current topic without introducing irrelevant ideas.
words.exampleSentence: We have a tight agenda, so please keep to the point during your review updates.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າໃຫ້ກົງປະເດັນ / ເວົ້າເຂົ້າເລື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: พูดให้ตรงประเด็น / ไม่ออกนอกเรื่อง

words.definition: To write or state a short version of technical results or survey data fields.
words.exampleSentence: The technical team will summarize the findings in the final chapter.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບຜົນການວິໄຈ / ສະຫຼຸບຜົນໄດ້ຮັບ
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปผลการวิจัย / สรุปสิ่งที่ค้นพบ

words.definition: To offer a high-level summary of a technical project framework or setup.
words.exampleSentence: Let me provide an overview of the regional trade dynamics before we start.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ພາບລວມ / ອະທິບາຍຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ภาพรวม / อธิบายสรุปภาพกว้าง

words.definition: To guide, moderate, and manage a group dialogue regarding a project theme.
words.exampleSentence: The senior advisor will lead a discussion on standard operating practices.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍາພາການສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: นำการอภิปราย / นำการสนทนา

words.definition: To officially set up a calendar date and time for a team alignment call.
words.exampleSentence: We need to schedule a meeting with the laboratory compliance auditors.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເວລານັດຫມາຍປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: นัดหมายการประชุม / จัดตารางประชุม

words.definition: To distribute new progress parameters or status corrections to coworkers.
words.exampleSentence: I will share the updates regarding the NASA data access via email.
words.laoTranslation: ແບ່ງປັນຂໍ້ມູນອັບເດດ
words.thaiTranslation: แบ่งปันข้อมูลอัปเดต / แจ้งข่าวความคืบหน้า

words.definition: To arrive at an agreement by both sides making mutual concessions in a dispute.
words.exampleSentence: After long debate, the two transport companies managed to reach a compromise.
words.laoTranslation: ບັນລຸຂໍ້ຕົກລົງຮ່ວມກັນ / ພົບກັນເຄິ່ງທາງ
words.thaiTranslation: บรรลุข้อตกลงร่วมกัน / ประนีประนอม

words.definition: To signal that the audience may begin asking queries to a keynote speaker.
words.exampleSentence: Once the presentation concludes, the panel will be open for questions.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດໂອກາດໃຫ້ຖາມຄໍາຖາມ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดโอกาสให้ซักถาม

words.definition: To compose an internal structural notification or policy reminder for office staff.
words.exampleSentence: The coordinator requested me to draft a memo regarding the train schedules.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างบันทึกข้อความภายใน

words.definition: To participate vigorously, sharing ideas during a workshop or presentation.
words.exampleSentence: Every regional partner is expected to take active part in the panel tracks.
words.laoTranslation: ມີສ່ວນຮ່ວມຢ່າງຫ້າວຫັນ
words.thaiTranslation: มีส่วนร่วมอย่างแข็งขัน

words.definition: To present the opening background and professional credentials of a panel guest.
words.exampleSentence: It is an absolute honor to introduce the speaker for today's keynote address.
words.laoTranslation: ແນະນໍາຜູ້ບັນລະຍາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: แนะนำวิทยากร / แนะนำผู้พูด

words.definition: To establish the general mood, quality, or standard of an assembly or report.
words.exampleSentence: The director's supportive opening remarks set the tone for the teamwork retreat.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດທິດທາງ / ສ້າງບັນຍາກາດ
words.thaiTranslation: กำหนดแนวทาง / สร้างบรรยากาศเชิงหลัก

words.definition: To redefine a goal to ensure every coworker understands the strategic direction.
words.exampleSentence: Before we subdivide tasks, let us clearly clarify the objective of this brief.
words.laoTranslation: ຊີ້ແຈງເປົ້າໝາຍໃຫ້ຊັດເຈນ
words.thaiTranslation: ชี้แจงเป้าหมายให้ชัดเจน

words.definition: To systematically go through the planned meeting tracks before starting.
words.exampleSentence: Let us quickly review the agenda to see if any items need shifting.
words.laoTranslation: ທົບທວນວາລະກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: ทบทวนวาระการประชุม

words.definition: To plan, direct, and facilitate an active practical learning session for colleagues.
words.exampleSentence: The forestry department plans to run a workshop on satellite monitoring.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດກອງປະຊຸມສໍາມະນາ / ຈັດເວີກຊັອບ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดเวิร์กช็อป / ดำเนินการสัมมนาเชิงปฏิบัติการ

words.definition: To give the formal introductory speech that initiates a major conference or forum.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver opening remarks at the regional expo.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວຄໍາປາໄສເປີດກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวเปิดงานอย่างเป็นทางการ / กล่าวต้อนรับ

words.definition: To combine diverse, complicated technical ideas into a clean, actionable model.
words.exampleSentence: An effective coordinator must synthesize complex viewpoints during regional debates.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະທັດສະນະທີ່ຊັບຊ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเคราะห์ความคิดเห็นที่ซับซ้อน

words.definition: To systematically lead separate corporate entities to follow the same policies.
words.exampleSentence: The main challenge is to drive institutional alignment across three strict ministries.
words.laoTranslation: ຊຸກຍູ້ການຮ່ວມມືລະຫວ່າງສະຖາບັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขับเคลื่อนความสอดคล้องเชิงสถาบัน

words.definition: To ensure that data analysis and technical reports follow the highest strict standards.
words.exampleSentence: We must maintain academic rigor when mapping forest canopy changes in AppSheet.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາຄວາມຖືກຕ້ອງທາງວິຊາການ
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาความถูกต้องแม่นยำทางวิชาการ

words.definition: Involving or carried out between different sectors or departments of an office.
words.exampleSentence: The coordinator organized an interdepartmental meeting to synchronize field tasks.
words.laoTranslation: ລະຫວ່າງພະແນກ / ຂ້າມຂະແໜງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ระหว่างแผนก / ข้ามกองงาน

words.definition: To arrange a time for a business meeting, briefing, or keynote speech in advance.
words.exampleSentence: We should pre-schedule the conference tracks to avoid overlapping technical panels.
words.laoTranslation: ກໍານົດເວລາລ່ວງໜ້າ / ນັດໝາຍໄວ້ກ່ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตารางล่วงหน้า / กำหนดการล่วงหน้า

words.definition: To fail to express technical data, report details, or strategic intentions clearly.
words.exampleSentence: If we miscommunicate the core requirements, the AppSheet prototype layout will fail.
words.laoTranslation: ສື່ສານຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: สื่อสารผิดพลาด / เข้าใจความหมายคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: To give excessive importance to a single point or issue in a report or speech.
words.exampleSentence: Do not overemphasize short-term opportunity costs at the expense of long-term carbon gains.
words.laoTranslation: ເນັ້ນໜັກເກີນຄວາມຈິງ / ໃຫ້ຄວາມສໍາຄັນເກີນໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: เน้นย้ำมากเกินไป / ให้ความสำคัญมากเกินไป

words.definition: A smaller committee filtered from a main board to address a specific office agenda.
words.exampleSentence: The regional standard center formed a subcommittee to audit laboratory compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ອະນຸກໍາມະການ
words.thaiTranslation: อนุกรรมการ / คณะทำงานย่อย

words.definition: An argument or set of reasons put forward to oppose an idea developed in another speech.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote panelist presented a brilliant counterargument backed by satellite data.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍ້ໂຕ້ແຍ່ງ / ເຫດຜົນຄັດຄ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: ข้อโต้แย้ง / เหตุผลหักล้าง

words.definition: The addition of extra details, context, or structural points to a brief or report.
words.exampleSentence: The director sent an email requesting further elaboration on the agricultural targets.
words.laoTranslation: ການຂະຫຍາຍຄວາມ / ການລົງເລິກລາຍລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: การขยายความ / การลงรายละเอียดเพิ่มเติม

words.exampleSentence: Accountability is important in government.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຮັບຜິດຊອບ
words.thaiTranslation: ความรับผิดชอบ

words.definition: In a way that holds together perfectly, creating a logical flow in a speech or document.
words.exampleSentence: The presentation slides were woven cohesively to tell a compelling project story.
words.laoTranslation: ຢ່າງກົມກຽວ / ຢ່າງຕໍ່ເນື່ອງມີເຫດຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: อย่างสอดคล้องต่อเนื่อง / อย่างเป็นอันหนึ่งอันเดียวกัน

words.definition: A colleague or external partner with whom a person coauthors a report or study.
words.exampleSentence: He mentioned his university collaborator during the opening keynote remarks.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ຮ່ວมງານ / ຜູ້ຮ່ວມມື
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้ร่วมงาน / ผู้ร่วมมือ

words.definition: Tactful and sensitive when handling difficult cross-departmental debates or emails.
words.exampleSentence: The manager gave a diplomatic response to pre-empt a major team conflict.
words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ມີລັກສະນະທາງການທູດ / ທີ່ຜ່ອນສັ້ນຜ່ອນຍາວ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่มีศิลปะในการทูต / ที่ประนีประนอมถนอมน้ำใจ

words.definition: A general summary or high-level baseline outline of a technical project.
words.exampleSentence: The consultant started with a brief overview of the regional railway metrics.
words.laoTranslation: ພາບລວມ / ບົດສະຫຼຸບໂດຍຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: ภาพรวม / สรุปย่อ

words.definition: The people who watch or listen
words.exampleSentence: The audience applauded loudly.
We leave a note for the teacher.
We provide input for the project.
We focus on our studies.

words.definition: To arrange your keynote concepts, data slides, and summaries in a logical layout.
words.exampleSentence: Always structure a presentation to address audience constraints first.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດໂຄງສ້າງການນໍາສະເໜີ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดโครงสร้างการนำเสนอ

words.definition: To systematically record all formal actions, decisions, and deadlines during a meeting.
words.exampleSentence: The project assistant was assigned to keep the minutes for the committee track.
words.laoTranslation: ຈົດບັນທຶກບົດບັນທຶກກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: จดบันทึกรายงานการประชุม

words.definition: To transmit an email verifying that a report layout or sync date is approved.
words.exampleSentence: Please send a confirmation email once you receive the standard certification brief.
words.laoTranslation: ສົ່ງຂໍ້ຄວາມຢືນຢັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่งอีเมลยืนยัน

words.definition: To manage and facilitate an interactive practical session on technical frameworks.
words.exampleSentence: He was requested to lead a workshop on carbon accounting tracking tools.
words.laoTranslation: ນໍາພາການສໍາມະນາ / ເປັນວິທະຍາກອນເວີກຊັອບ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นวิทยากรจัดเวิร์กช็อป / นำการสัมมนาเชิงปฏิบัติการ

words.definition: To officially initiate a formal office discussion, session, or coordination call.
words.exampleSentence: The department director will open the meeting sharp at nine o'clock.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດກອງປະຊຸມ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดการประชุม

words.definition: To write the preliminary version of a business plan, setup strategy, or framework.
words.exampleSentence: The advisory group plans to draft a proposal for the standard validation center.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່າງຂໍ້ສະເໜີໂຄງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ร่างข้อเสนอโครงการ

words.definition: To direct a group of diverse collaborators to arrive at an aligned strategic choice.
words.exampleSentence: A core skill for leaders is the ability to build team consensus during disputes.
words.laoTranslation: ສ້າງຄວາມເຫັນພ້ອມເປັນເອກະພາບ
words.thaiTranslation: สร้างมติเห็นพ้องต้องกันในทีม

words.definition: To state or write a condensed abstract covering primary technical findings.
words.exampleSentence: The final slides provide a summary of calculated opportunity costs.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້ໃຫ້ຊາບ / ໃຫ້ບົດສະຫຼຸບຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: สรุปใจความสำคัญให้ / ให้บทสรุปย่อ

words.definition: To manage and answer technical queries raised by an audience after a presentation.
words.exampleSentence: The keynote speaker will handle the Q&A session using a slido platform.
words.laoTranslation: ຕອບຄໍາຖາມຊັກຖາມ / ຄຸມຊ່ວງຖາມ-ຕອບ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดการช่วงถาม-ตอบ / ตอบคำถามผู้ฟัง

words.definition: To greet conference attendees and panel guests during opening remarks.
words.exampleSentence: Allow me to welcome the participants who traveled via the cross-border railway.
words.laoTranslation: ຕ້ອນຮັບຜູ້ເຂົ້າຮ່ວມ
words.thaiTranslation: ต้อนรับผู้เข้าร่วมงาน

words.definition: To officially ask an advisor via email to explain a confusing report point.
words.exampleSentence: We need to seek structural clarification regarding the boundary data criteria.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍຄໍາຊີ້ແຈງເພີ່ມເຕີມ
words.thaiTranslation: ขอคำชี้แจงเชิงโครงสร้างข้อมูล

words.definition: To systematically align daily internal assignments, updates, and syncs.
words.exampleSentence: An app layout can help administrative staff coordinate office activities.
words.laoTranslation: ປະສານງານການເຄື່ອນໄຫວໃນຫ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: ประสานงานกิจกรรมต่างๆ ในสำนักงาน

words.definition: To share an internal operational notice or brief policy message with staff.
words.exampleSentence: The committee plans to distribute a memo about laboratory safety compliance.
words.laoTranslation: ແຈກຢາຍບັນທຶກຂໍ້ຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: แจกจ่ายบันทึกข้อความภายใน

words.definition: To state politely in a meeting that you object to a data interpretation or plan.
words.exampleSentence: Do not hesitate to express technical disagreement if the calculations are wrong.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດงຄວາມຄິດເຫັນຂັດແຍ່ງທາງວິຊາການ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงความเห็นแย้งทางเทคนิคอย่างสุภาพ

words.definition: To formally end debate on a specific meeting agenda item or forum track.
words.exampleSentence: Since our time is running out, let us close the discussion and vote.
words.laoTranslation: ປິດການສົນທະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: ปิดการอภิปราย / จบประเด็นการสนทนา

words.definition: To adjust a tracking dashboard or tell managers about recent task progress.
words.exampleSentence: Please update the status of your research-related visits on the shared map.
words.laoTranslation: ອັບເດດສະຖານະຄວາມຄືບໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: อัปเดตสถานะความคืบหน้า

words.definition: To present the primary, highly influential address at a formal symposium.
words.exampleSentence: The Assistant Professor will deliver a keynote speech on agroforestry frameworks.
words.laoTranslation: ກ່າວປາຖະກະຖາຄັ້ງສໍາຄັນ
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวปาฐกถาพิเศษบนเวทีใหญ่

words.definition: To act as the neutral facilitator governing an expert debate at a forum.
words.exampleSentence: She was invited to moderate a panel discussion on regional trade dynamics.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຜູ້ດໍາເນີນການອະພິປາຍຄະນະຊ່ຽວຊານ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นผู้ดำเนินรายการเสวนาคณะผู้เชี่ยวชาญ

words.definition: To process and merge multiple complicated technical data layers into a clean brief.
words.exampleSentence: Our software tools help researchers synthesize complex data from remote sensors.
words.laoTranslation: ສັງເຄາະຂໍ້ມູນທີ່ຊັບຊ້ອນ
words.thaiTranslation: สังเคราะห์ข้อมูลที่ซับซ้อน

words.definition: To subtly guide team consensus and policy strategies through expert authority.
words.exampleSentence: Senior advisors exert professional influence to drive strict institutional alignment.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດงອິດທિພົນທາງວິຊາຊີບ
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงอิทธิพลทางวิชาชีพ / บริหารการยอมรับ

words.definition: Relating to relationships or communication between several people in an office team.
words.exampleSentence: Strong interpersonal skills are critical when leading a cross-functional workshop.
words.laoTranslation: ລະຫວ່າງບຸກຄົນ / ມະນຸດສໍາພັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ระหว่างบุคคล / มนุษยสัมพันธ์

words.definition: To enter names or details on an official conference attendee sheet beforehand.
words.exampleSentence: Please pre-register online to secure a seat at the main keynote speech track.
words.laoTranslation: ລົງທະບຽນລ່ວງໜ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ลงทะเบียนล่วงหน้า

words.definition: To give a team member false, inaccurate, or poorly checked report data by mistake.
words.exampleSentence: We must verify the satellite raster fields so we do not misinform our directors.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ຂໍ້ມູນຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ข้อมูลผิดพลาด / ให้ข้อมูลคลาดเคลื่อน

words.definition: The action of dividing an office presentation structure into separate, clear topics.
words.exampleSentence: A clear subdivision of tasks prevents overlap among our field research teams.
words.laoTranslation: ການແບ່ງຍ່ອຍ / ສ່ວນຍ່ອຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การแบ่งย่อย / ส่วนแยกย่อย

words.definition: A person holding an equivalent position or office post in another organization.
